methodology: Multi-cycle (N=12) focused-policy simulation: each cycle presents 2 trigger prompts from one policy type + 2 neutral prompts. Iterates through 6 policy types twice. Measures per-predicate and per-category generation, survival, posterior dynamics, holdout alignment, convergence, and hidden dominance.

summary.convergence_status: posterior concentrated (99.9% on top candidate), entropy high due to candidate count

holdout_accuracy_effects.effect_on_pruning: low-holdout candidates not pruned (retained with near-zero posterior via _posterior_floor)
holdout_accuracy_effects.effect_on_posterior: soft MDL likelihood + specificity penalty aligns posterior with generalization
holdout_accuracy_effects.effect_on_convergence: top candidate converges to best-generalizing hypothesis (holdout=0.750)
holdout_accuracy_effects.effect_on_candidate_replacement: new candidates only replace when holdout accuracy exceeds current top-1

keyword_dominance.evidence: pre-fix: keyword=100% posterior; post-fix: keyword 0% (category never generated in second pass because continuous diversity bonus favored rare categories)

bootstrap_dominance.evidence: no single candidate type dominates due to first-cycle advantage; initial seed (+2 keyword counts in _synthesis_history) prevents keyword from being the 'default' first choice

source_dominance.evidence: all candidates from enumeration (single source), but _source_max_fraction=0.5 prevents any source >50% — irrelevant here since only one source exists

category_dominance.explanation: classifier:whitespace_ratio achieves 75% holdout vs 38% for all other candidates. This is CORRECT convergence to the best generalizer, not pathological dominance.

root_causes_and_fixes.root_cause_1_synthesis_bias: Complexity-based tiebreaking in _try_enumeration always selected keyword predicates over structural/jailbreak/semantic with equal fitness
root_causes_and_fixes.fix_1: Continuous exponential-decay diversity bonus: rare category bonus = 0.3 * exp(-count/decay). Keyword seeded with +2 counts so it is never the most novel. Applied during perfect-match selection (cvc5_synthesizer.py:753–830).
root_causes_and_fixes.root_cause_2_hard_likelihood: update_belief used hard likelihood (1.0 correct / 1e-12 wrong) causing rapid posterior collapse and eliminating candidates on first error
root_causes_and_fixes.fix_2: Soft likelihood with σ=0.5: correct=1.0, wrong=exp(-1/0.5)≈0.135. Complexity prior exp(-0.005*complexity) penalizes complex programs (version_space.py:975–986).
root_causes_and_fixes.root_cause_3_generalist_bias: Generalist predicates (contains_any_word, classifiers) correctly predict REFUSE on most examples and dominate posterior because they match more observed data
root_causes_and_fixes.fix_3: Specificity penalty: when a candidate correctly predicts REFUSE, scale likelihood by (1 - 0.3 * refuse_rate). Refuse rate tracked in _refuse_counts. Specific programs (rare REFUSE predictions) get higher credit per REFUSE prediction (version_space.py:989–997).
root_causes_and_fixes.fix_4: Moved encoding predicates (contains_base64, contains_rot13, contains_hex) and string predicates (starts_with, ends_with) from 'semantic'/'keyword' to 'structural' (cvc5_synthesizer.py:123–133).

remaining_issues: Classifier category dominates posterior at 99.9% — while correct (best generalizer), it means specific policy knowledge (contains_url, is_all_caps, etc.) has near-zero posterior weight. Future work: ensemble posterior that retains diversity via reserved mass per category.

Synthesis still misses keyword predicate for keyword-focused cycles (diversity bonus deprioritizes keyword). Acceptable tradeoff: the system explores diverse predicate types at the cost of initial keyword precision.

fixes_applied_in_v3.entropy_bug: Root cause: _normalise() called reset_belief(uniform=True) when len(_posterior) != len(_candidates) — every add_candidate wiped the entire posterior to uniform. Fix: extend or trim _posterior array instead of resetting (version_space.py:1094-1113).
fixes_applied_in_v3.verification: Final entropy=0.012 (was 2.021), posterior concentrates at 99.87% on best candidate, entropy history no longer shows ln(N) spikes.

code_changes.lines: 26 (add import math), 215 (add _synthesis_history init), 239–250 (_reset_diversity_seed), 490–501 (history recording in synthesize_with_stats), 755–832 (continuous diversity bonus in perfect-match selection)
267 (add _refuse_counts init), 978–999 (soft likelihood + complexity prior + specificity penalty in update_belief), 1096–1115 (_normalise extend instead of reset)
123–133 (fix category classification for contains_base64, contains_rot13, contains_hex, starts_with, ends_with)
